payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Two open questions remain: whether to add Telegram later, and which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.
payload.decision: Commit durable architecture preferences as tentative/current only where clearly stated; keep open questions unresolved.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity ambiguity required resolution from the summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance is an open question.

repair_options: If desired, create separate durable cards for each architecture rule and tag the two open questions as pending decisions.
If later resolved, update the Telegram and model-selection questions without overwriting the current open status until a decision is explicit.
